content.en:
With tens of thousands of eternal years of penance, and with the assistance of the Eternal Treasure and the Gray Mist Bridge, Ye Tian has made great progress.

this day.

Ye Tian's Eternal Dao of Ten Thousand Lives has made a substantial breakthrough, and this Eternal Dao has directly stepped into the realm of Dacheng, and even the Mixed Yuan Eternal Dao has also cultivated and comprehended the peak realm of Xiaocheng.

Not only that, Ye Tian also had another gain, that is, he had some understanding of the Gray Mist Eternal Dao, but there was still a long way to go to completely comprehend the Gray Mist Eternal Dao, because the Gray Mist Eternal Dao was indeed too powerful, so it was extremely difficult to cultivate the Gray Mist Eternal Dao.

Source Sea, barren area.

The fluctuations caused by the Gray Mist Stone Statue are getting bigger and bigger, spreading to a large area, and at this time, any Eternal Realm who comes to the barren area will sense the situation here.

Thus, it was not long before the vision of the barren area was discovered.

So at this time, Ye Tian reported the situation of the Gray Mist Stone Statue to the True Saintless Land, otherwise once the Source Sea attracted the attention of other forces, Ye Tian would not be able to block those powerful forces with the 08 method, so he had to pull the True Nothing Holy Land into the water

And the person Ye Tian reported to was the Frostless Lord.

......

"Endless Lord, are you saying that a stone statue of gray mist has appeared in the Source Sea?"

The Frostless Lord exclaimed.

"Yes!"

Ye Tian nodded.

The Frostless Lord looked at Ye Tian deeply and said, "Before, when you asked me about the attack of the Eternal Master, you didn't ask about the trace on the Gray Mist Stone Statue, right?"

"Indeed, that trace!"

Ye Tian admitted.

The Frostless Lord didn't blame Ye Tian, after all, it was normal to hide the news, and now that it was impossible to hide, he would naturally choose to report it to the True Frostless Holy Land.

At this time, the Frostless Lord said, "I have heard of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, but I have never seen it. The Gray Mist Stone Statue is indeed an extremely amazing chance, and it is also very weird, it has a lot of levels, and you can get some benefits for each level, but what the final level is, no one knows, those Legendary Realm Lords have also entered the Gray Mist Stone Statue, maybe the Legendary Realm Lord knows more secrets. In addition, the Grey Mist only allows 100 lives to enter it at a time, and once it exceeds 100 lives, no other life can enter the Grey Mist. When 100 beings emerge from the Grey Mist, the Grey Mist will leave that area and travel to another area. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

No wonder, the gray mist stone statue will run to the source sea

"Lord Frostless, I need two slots, and the other slots are for the True No Holy Land. "

Ye Tian said.

"No problem!" Lord Frostless nodded, "I will report to the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Void Holy Land, and then the Truly Void Saint Land will block the area of the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and when the other forces know about it, they will not be able to enter it again." "

Soon, the Frostless Lord explained the situation of the Grey Mist Stone Statue.

Subsequently, Ye Tian saw the Rising Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land.

Rumble!!!!!

Without the help of the space-time ladder, this Legendary Realm Lord directly shattered the space-time, crossed the Endless Void Region, and descended to the Source Sea.

He is the Legendary Realm Lord of the True Saintless Land, the Lord of Longgu.

The Dragon Ancient Lord is the ancestor of the Primordial Ancestral Dragon Clan of the Infinite Sea, but there are not many Primordial Ancestral Dragons of the Infinite Sea, in the course of the long years, many Primordial Ancestral Dragons have fallen, plus there are no new Primordial Ancestral Dragons born, and now there are less than twenty Primordial Ancestral Dragons, but they have all reached the Legendary Lord level, and now there are a few who have reached the Legendary Lord realm of the Transcendence Realm.

Ye Tian had heard of the Dragon Gu Lord, but now it was the first time he had seen it.

"I've seen Lord Longgu!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

"Well, you're pretty good!"

Lord Longgu looked at Ye Tian, nodded slightly, and then looked at the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

He saw the gray mist stone statue at a glance, and immediately took out a scale.

This scale contains his power.

The next moment, this scale came out and flew towards the area where the Gray Mist Stone Statue was located.

Airplanes!!!!

The Endless Space-Time was suppressed and banned, and no one could forcibly tear the space-time to the place where the Grey Mist Stone Statue was

Seeing this scene, Ye Tiancai truly recognized the strength of the legendary lord of the Legendary Realm, and he could easily be suppressed with just one scale.

Wow!

A portal is born that leads to the Grey Mist Stone Statue.

Soon.

A Legendary Lord appeared, and a Half-Step Legendary Realm Lord, Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord, and several Realm Legendary Lords of the True Void Holy Land descended, and they all entered the Gray Mist Stone Statue.

At this time, Ye Tian said: "Lord Longgu, these two legendary lords of our source sea are also going to enter the Gray Mist Stone Statue, they are the legendary lords who discovered the Gray Mist Stone Statue, so I promise to give them a place." "

Lord Longgu looked at Lord Binghan and Lord Saint Peak, and this glance made Lord Ice Han and Lord Saint Peak tremble, and they didn't dare to move.

"The strength is too weak, the potential is average, and there is not much chance of entering the Gray Mist Stone Statue, but since it has been promised, let them go in too!"

Immediately.

Everyone went in one by one, but Lord Longgu naturally didn't go in, maybe he had gone in.

Abrupt.

The Dragon Gu Lord's face changed, and he said, "Come in, there is a Legendary Realm Lord here!"

Whoa!!

A Legendary Lord of the True Void Sacred Land quickly rushed into the crack of the Grey Mist Stone Statue and rushed through the crack.

The strength of the Ice Han Lord and the Holy Peak Lord was too weak, and as soon as they entered, they were a little unable to withstand the bombardment of the entrance power, and they were quickly injured.

At the critical moment, Ye Tian protected them, and this was the only help he could do.

113クThank you Hentai Lord!"

Lord Ice Han and Lord Sacred Peak said gratefully

If it weren't for Ye Tian, they were afraid that they wouldn't be able to get in, and they would waste this opportunity in vain.

It was also at this time that the Dragon Gu Lord fought against a Famous Legendary Realm Lord.

Bang!!!!

The endless time and space of the Source Sea are shaking, and a large area of territory is collapsing.

Fortunately, they only fought one or two before they completely stopped, otherwise the loss caused to Yuanhai would be too great.

"Lord Longgu, you really have no Holy Land too much, you actually sent in a hundred Legendary Lords at once, and took all the opportunities this time!" said a Legendary Realm Lord angrily.

The Dragon Gu Lord sneered, "It's a big deal for you to wait for them to come out this time, and then find the Gray Mist Stone Statue, and then send the Legendary Lord in." "

"If we can stop or catch up with the Grey Mist Stone Statue, will we still argue with you here?" another Legendary Realm Lord was furious.

At this time, the Longgu Lord saw that all the 100 Legendary Lords had entered, got out of the way, and said, "The Gray Mist Stone Statue is there, if you can go in, then go in, I won't stop it!"

"You're ruthless!"

One by one, the Legendary Realm Lords retreated, since they were a step too late, there was no way, who let the True Saintless Land move so fast, they just received a little news, and immediately came over to confirm, and the result was a step later.

Soon, all of these Legendary Realm Lords left. _
